meanings.definition: pull back or move away or backward
examples: The limo pulled away from the curb

meanings.definition: use a surgical instrument to hold open (the edges of a wound or an organ)
move to a rearward position; pull towards the back
stretch back a bowstring (on an archer's bow)
examples: The archers were drawing their bows

meanings.definition: make a retreat from an earlier commitment or activity
examples: We'll have to crawfish out from meeting with him
He backed out of his earlier promise
The aggressive investment company pulled in its horns
